perksWithImages.name: Hex: The Third Seal
perksWithImages.description:
When the trial starts, a Dull Totem ignites.

Whenever you damage a Survivor with a basic or special-attack, they gain {Keyword.Blindness}.

This applies for up to {Tunable.K05P01.MaxAffectedSurvivors} Survivors.

perksWithImages.name: Repressed Alliance
perksWithImages.description: After repairing Generators for {Tunable.S22P03.RepairTimeNeeded}s, while repairing a Generator alone, use {Input.ActivatableButton1} to block that generator for {Tunable.S22P03.GeneratorBlockDuration}s.

perksWithImages.name: Counterforce
perksWithImages.description:
When the trial starts, you earn {Tunable.S26P01.StartingTokens} Token.

Whenever you cleanse a Totem, earn {Tunable.S26P01.TokensPerCleanse} Token, then, you see the Aura of the farthest Totem for {Tunable.S26P01.AuraRevealDuration}s.

For each Token, you cleanse Totems {Tunable.S26P01.StackableCleanseSpeed%}% faster.

perksWithImages.name: Zanshin Tactics
perksWithImages.description:
Within {Tunable.K18P01.VaultablesRevealDistance}m, you see the Auras of Pallets and windows.

Whenever a Survivor drops a Pallet, you see their Aura for {Tunable.K18P01.AuraRevealDuration}s.
